34. Comfortable Carrying. Should the Adhana Ascendant be occupied by Moon, or should there
be benefics in the 5th, 9th, 7th, 2nd, 10th, 4th and malefics relegated to 3rd and 11th aspected by
the Sun, the carrying female is safe.
35-41. Adversities to the Pregnant Woman.
If at the time of Adhana the Sun and the Moon are hemmed between two malefics, while the
Ascendant has no benefic aspect, the female concerned dies. The same effect prevails, if the
said Ascendant and the 7th are occupied by malefics and be without benefic aspect, or, if the
said Ascendant is occupied by Saturn and weak Moon aspected by Mars. Again similar
effects shall come to pass, if weak Moon and the Sun are in 12th, Mars in 4th, while Venus is
between two malefics. Both the child in the womb and its mother leave this world, if malefics
